briefing.market_summary: KOSPI index down 3.6% to 5,281.22 points on April 2, 2026, amid heightened geopolitical tensions regarding US-Iran relations.
briefing.art_news: BAMA (Busan Annual Market of Art) is ongoing (April 2-5). ART OnO kicks off tomorrow (April 3-5). Korea's Galleries Art Fair is scheduled for April 8-12 at COEX.
